results.title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds - The Economic Times
excerpts:
Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
iStock ABSL MF Halts fresh subscriptions, revises SIP/STP & Liquid Fund Minimums.
Synopsis
Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscriptions in three international funds from 7 Oct 2025, revises minimum SIP/STP and Liquid Fund application amounts, while existing plans continue unaffected.
By [SURBHI KHANNA](https://m.economictimes.com/etreporter/author-surbhi-khanna-479258713.cms) [](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=economictimes "Google preferences in ET") [Follow us](https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6dOI1EKyZPPqpH7I0y)
ET Online
Last Updated: Oct 08, 2025, 12:22:19 PM IST
SHARE THIS NEWS
Close
Font Size
Abc Small
Abc Normal
Abc Large
Close
[](https://m.economictimes.com/mf/mf-news/aditya-birla-sun-life-mutual-fund-suspends-fresh-subscription-in-its-3-international-funds/comment/124379463.cms)
Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
[Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/topic/aditya-birla-sun-life-mutual-fund) has suspended fresh subscriptions to its three [international funds](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/topic/international-funds) effective 7 October 2025, informing unit holders via a notice-cum-addendum.
Tired of too many ads? Remove Ads
The three international funds include: [Aditya Birla Sun Life International Equity Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/topic/aditya-birla-sun-life-international-equity-fund) , Aditya Birla Sun Life Global Emerging Opportunities Fund, and Aditya Birla Sun Life Global Excellence Equity Fund of Fund.
 ... 
Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund suspends fresh subscription in its 3 international funds
Content:
Further, no fresh registrations under systematic transactions, viz., Systematic Investment Plan (SIP) and Systematic Transfer Plan (STP), will be accepted, and no units will be allotted under SIP and STP falling on or after the effective date. However, for installments falling due under SIP/STP registered prior to the effective date, processing will continue under the respective plans/options of the schemes.
Tired of too many ads? Remove Ads
The fund house further stated that, in view of the above, relevant changes will be carried out in the SAI, SID, and KIM of the schemes. All other features, terms, and conditions of the SAI, SID, and KIM of the schemes of the fund will remain unchanged. This notice-cum-addendum forms an integral part of the SAI, SID, and KIM issued for the schemes, read together with the addenda issued thereunder.
Popular in MF
1.

Section Title: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund Halts Fresh Subscriptions in 3 International Funds
Content:
[](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.angelone.in%2Fnews%2Fmutual-funds%2Faditya-birla-sun-life-mutual-fund-halts-fresh-subscriptions-in-3-international-funds)  [](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=https://www.angelone.in)
 ... 
Section Title: ... > **Fresh Inflows Ceased in Global Fund Lineup**
Content:
Effective October 7, 2025, [Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/amc/aditya-birla-sunlife-mutual-funds) announced a suspension on all fresh subscription and switch-in applications for its 3 international funds. The affected products are: [Aditya Birla Sun Life International Equity Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/aditya-birla-sun-life-international-equity-fund-plan-a-growth-direct-plan) , [Global Emerging Opportunities Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/aditya-birla-sun-life-global-emerging-opportunities-fund-direct-plan-growth) , and [Global Excellence Equity Fund of Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/aditya-birla-sun-life-global-excellence-equity-fund-of-fund-retail-plan-direct-plan-growth) . Submissions received post-cut-off on the stipulated date are no longer processed.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > **Revised Daily SIP and Liquid Fund Minimums**
Content:
In an operational update, the fund house also revised daily SIP minimums via digital platforms from October 8, 2025. For equity and hybrid schemes, the new minimum instalment is ₹10 and in multiples of ₹1. For the [Aditya Birla Sun Life Liquid Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/aditya-birla-sun-life-liquid-fund-growth-direct-plan) , it has been revised to ₹30. These changes cater to entry-level retail participation while preserving scheme structure.
**Read More:** [Groww Mutual Fund Filed Draft With SEBI for Small Cap Fund](https://www.angelone.in/news/mutual-funds/groww-mutual-fund-filed-draft-with-sebi-for-small-cap-fund) !

results.title: Invesco Mutual Fund Halts New Subscriptions in 3 Overseas Funds Due to Investment Limit
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > **Temporary Suspension of Global Fund Subscriptions**
Content:
[Invesco Mutual Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/amc/invesco-mutual-funds) has temporarily halted investments into 3 international schemes due to limitations on overseas investments. The affected FoFs are: [Invesco India - Invesco Global Equity Income Fund of Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/invesco-india-invesco-global-equity-income-fund-of-fund-direct-plan-growth) , [Invesco India - Invesco Pan European Equity Fund of Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/invesco-india-invesco-pan-european-equity-fund-of-fund-direct-plan-growth) , and [Invesco India - Invesco Global Consumer Trends Fund of Fund](https://www.angelone.in/mutual-funds/mf-schemes/invesco-india-invesco-global-consumer-trends-fund-of-fund-direct-plan-growth) . This suspension includes lump sum investments, switch-ins, new SIPs, STPs, and IDCW Transfer Plans where these are the target schemes.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > **Compliance with Overseas Investment Limits**
Content:
This move aligns with SEBI’s directive dated February 1, 2022, which restricts AMCs from breaching maximum overseas exposure limits at the individual fund level. Invesco’s action reflects an effort to comply strictly with those existing caps until further regulatory adjustments are made.
**Read More:** [Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund Halts Fresh Subscriptions in 3 International Funds](https://www.angelone.in/news/mutual-funds/aditya-birla-sun-life-mutual-fund-halts-fresh-subscriptions-in-3-international-funds) !

results.title: International funds gave up to 58% returns on one year; here are funds open for subscription
excerpts:
Section Title: International funds gave up to 58% returns on one year; here are funds open for subscription
Content:
fund houses reserve the right to suspend subscriptions when they are close to the headroom limit.
International mutual funds from the US to China have been giving decent returns to investors. However, not many of the schemes are open for investments.
Although investing in international markets through mutual funds has proven effective, regulatory norms often restrict this approach.
Story continues below Advertisement
[Remove Ad](https://www.moneycontrol.com/promos/pro.php)
In February 2022, the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) asked domestic mutual fund companies to stop further investments in foreign stocks.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Related Stories
Content:
Later, the capital market regulator allowed mutual funds to invest in foreign stocks as long as their fund deployment adhered to the RBI ceilings. Many fund houses have since then sporadically accepted subscriptions.
At a when **[Indian mutual fund industry](https://www.moneycontrol.com/news/business/markets/mutual-fund-industry-seeks-increase-in-overall-overseas-limit-13166556.html)** has once again raised the issue of enhancement in overseas limit for investment, only 26 out of 70 international funds are accepting fresh investments.
**All top-performing funds are closed**
Story continues below Advertisement
[Remove Ad](https://www.moneycontrol.com/promos/pro.php)
Data available with ACE MF, a mutual fund research platform, shows that Mirae Asset Hang Seng TECH ETF FoF is the top performing international fund on a one-year basis with a return of 57.8 percent till July 9, 2025.
Section Title: ... > Related Stories
Content:
It is followed by Mirae Asset NYSE FANG+ETF FoF (50.7 percent returns), Mirae Asset Hang Seng TECH ETF (49.0 percent), Nippon India ETF Hang Seng BeES (42.5 percent) and Mirae Asset S&P 500 Top 50 ETF FoF (35.2 percent).
Notably, all these funds are closed for fresh subscription. However, in the case of ETFs, while fund houses are not creating new fund units, investors can directly trade in them via exchanges.
**Schemes accepting fresh investments**
Do remember that the fund houses reserve the right to suspend subscriptions when they are close to the headroom limit.
Most funds that are open for subscription allow both subscriptions via systematic investment plan and lump sum without any minimum or maximum limit. However, some funds have imposed restrictions based on maximum investment per PAN per day level.
Section Title: ... > Related Stories
Content:
**Also read | [Precious metal funds inflows at all-time high in June; experts favour blended approach](https://www.moneycontrol.com/news/business/personal-finance/precious-metal-funds-inflows-at-all-time-high-in-june-experts-favour-blended-approach-13253824.html)**
For example, all overseas funds of Edelweiss Mutual Fund are open, however, there is a restriction of Rs 10 lakh per PAN per day.
In the case of Baroda BNP Paribas Aqua FoF, lump sum investment is allowed, while fresh SIPs are stopped. On top of that there is a limit of Rs 5 lakh per PAN per day.
International mutual funds have direct investments in overseas stocks worth Rs 58,000 crore as of June end. The mutual fund industry believes there is a strong case for relaxing the investment caps and has raised the issue with the regulator as well.
Moneycontrol PF Team
first published: Jul 11, 2025 10:03 pm
